description_long: This is an electric guitar with a single-cutaway body finished in a glossy green color, featuring a quilted or textured pattern on the front and back. The body is equipped with two humbucker pickups, three gold control knobs, a pickup selector switch, and a fixed bridge, all in metallic gold. The neck is made of a lighter wood, contrasting with the dark brown fretboard, and the headstock is angled with three tuning pegs on each side. The back of the guitar shows a black electronics cavity cover and the same green textured finish. The overall design is reminiscent of classic Les Paul-style guitars, with a solid, contoured body and a set neck joint. The instrument is visually striking and built for both aesthetic appeal and functional playability.
description: A glossy green, single-cutaway electric guitar with gold hardware, dual humbuckers, and a contoured, textured body. The neck is light wood with a dark fretboard and a classic angled headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green quilted body, gold hardware, two humbucker pickups, three control knobs, and the pickup selector switch.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's slim body depth and the protruding hardware, with the neck and headstock visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the green textured back, black electronics cavity cover, and the light wood neck joint.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body thickness and the neck's attachment, with hardware details less visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, classic Les Paul-style shape
